_comment: Species: Wind Demon (风魔) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wind Demon

canonical.appearance: Formless wind-aspected demon 5 m manifestation, body is a living storm, eyes are lightning
canonical.size: 5 m manifestation, 0 jin (wind); true form spans storm-zones
canonical.behavior: Wind-incarnate demon; cultivates by absorbing storms; hunts by calling tornadoes
canonical.habitat: Storm zones, wind-aspected forbidden zones, high altitudes
canonical.relationships: N100 is the cultivator who commands wind demons; antagonist
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: wind_demon_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
